problem id: 18ab3864
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(5) XOR SHR(6)

examples:
  11000011 -> 01100011
  01000011 -> 01100001
  00100110 -> 11000000
  01001111 -> 11100001
  10011010 -> 01000010
  01000001 -> 00100001
  10010100 -> 10000010
  01100110 -> 11000001
  01111001 -> 00100001

query: 00011101
predicted answer: 10100000
